name: questplus
description: Info on the Quest Subscription Service, Quest+

blocks.text: The below pages contain info on Meta Quest +, click each one to learn more about the program, or 'Summary' for a brief overview.
Meta Quest+ is Meta's version of Xbox Game Pass - Get 2 monthly games, selected by Meta, to add to your library each month and explore the **Games Catalog** to add even more!
Meta Quest+ is Meta's version of Xbox Game Pass/Live Gold - Get 2 monthly games, selected by Meta, to add to your library each month and explore the **Games Catalog** to add even more!

Meta Quest + also offers a game catalog! These games rotate in and out just like Game Pass or PS+. Check back every few months to see what's new, you can see a full list of the currently available titles [here](https://www.meta.com/experiences/section/746836817401205/)

Meta Quest + includes exclusive deals for members, these include deals on hit classics such as **Superhot VR**, but new titles also rotate in, like **Arizona Sunshine 2** and many others! Meta will also occasionally give out 30% off coupons for *any* game on the Store to subscribers!

pages.name: do-i-keep-my-games-after-cancell
pages.title: Do I keep my games after cancelling?

blocks.text: Do I keep my games after cancelling?

No, just like Xbox Game Pass or PlayStation Plus, you lose access to your games once your subscription month ends; until then, you keep access to them.
As soon as you resubscribe, you'll regain access to all claimed games, regardless of whether it's still their month.

As of February 2025, Meta Quest + now occasionally offers Game Trials! These are random, and completely up to Meta, but they last for up to 2 weeks.
To check if there is a current trial, check your Meta Quest + dashboard.

As of February 2025, Horizon+ now offers Add-Ons. Sometimes these will be game content, like Walkabout Minigolf courses, and other times just cosmetics, like the Ug bundles. Currently, these only appear in-headset.

pages.name: do-i-get-the-rift-versions-of-th
pages.title: Do I get the Rift Versions of these games?

blocks.text: Do I get the Rift Versions of these games?
At this moment, no. However this can change in the future.
